Chapter 3: Reference Page

A compact third chapter used to verify longer chapter sequences and generated navigation.

Document Information

Version
0.1.0
Last updated
2026-04-25
Author
Atsushi Suzuki

Purpose

This page confirms that the build script can generate a three-chapter sequence from the manifest. It is intentionally small so Chapter 1 remains the primary component reference.

Add more chapters by creating a new fragment under chapters-src/ and adding it to chapters-src/site-manifest.json.

Reference Note

Manifest-driven Navigation

The left-side Contents tree and previous/next links are generated from the chapter order in the manifest.

Minimal generated chapter for three-page workflow checks.
